title: eryngium × olivierianum
intro: Eryngium × olivierianum, also known as the Miss Willmott's Ghost, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Eryngium × olivierianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
